bonus_languages_note.value: Giant, Gnome, Goblin, Orc, Terran, Undercommon.

value.name: Slow and Steady
value.description: Dwarves have a base speed of 20 ft but their speed is never modified by armor or encumbrance.

value.name: Darkvision
value.description: Dwarves can see in the dark up to 60 ft.

value.name: Defensive Training
value.description: +4 dodge bonus to AC vs creatures of the giant subtype.

value.name: Greed
value.description: +2 racial bonus on Appraise checks to determine the price of nonmagical goods that contain precious metals or gemstones.

value.name: Hatred
value.description: +1 racial bonus on attack rolls against humanoid creatures of the orc and goblinoid subtypes.

value.name: Hardy
value.description: +2 racial bonus on saving throws against poison, spells, and spell-like abilities.

value.name: Stability
value.description: +4 racial bonus on CMD vs bull rush or trip while standing on the ground.

value.name: Stonecunning
value.description: +2 racial bonus on Perception checks to notice unusual stonework.

value.name: Weapon Familiarity
value.description: Proficient with battleaxes, heavy picks, and warhammers; treat any weapon with 'dwarven' in name as martial.
